Project timeline
1
Sign and pay 50%
SAI delivers drawings within 4 working days. Client approves within 2 working days.
2
Design approval
WhatsApp group created. One designated contact person for all approvals.
3
Site preparation
Site fully ready 20 working days before install. All civil and MEP works complete.
4
Pay remaining 50%
12 working days before installation week to confirm your slot.
5
Installation
Wooden works within 60 days of design approval. PU/Veneer painting within 90 days.
6
Handover
Sign handover form within 2 days of completion notice. Warranty begins.
Payment terms
50% on signing
50% before install
First 50% on contract signing — design starts immediately.
Final 50% paid 12 working days before the scheduled installation week.
+5% VAT added with the final payment.
Postponement by client: 90% due once manufacturing complete, 10% seven days before new date.
Storage fees after 7-day grace: 0.25%–1% per day based on project value.
What SAI commits to
Precise installation — straight lines, perfect finishes, approved design followed 100%.
Fix any damage caused by SAI team during delivery or installation.
Keep you updated from delivery to handover — no surprises.
Never leave site without your full satisfaction and final sign-off.
Warranty support for post-handover issues and touch-ups.
Create a WhatsApp group for smooth communication throughout the project.
Provide electrical and plumbing location diagrams before installation.
What the client needs to do
Site fully ready 20 working days before install — ceiling, painting, tiling, MEP all done.
Walls, floors, and surfaces must be level and structurally sound.
Provide power supply (electricity or generator) throughout installation.
Designate one contact person for all drawings, approvals, and coordination.
Gas, plumbing, electrical connections are client responsibility unless quoted.
Verbal agreements are not binding — everything must be written in the contract.
Obtain gate passes, NOCs, and access permits before site work begins.
Warranty coverage
15 yrs
Wood products
1 yr
Lighting and accessories
12 mo
Countertop workmanship
1 yr
SPC and LVT flooring
Warranty void if units re-installed, tampered with, or serviced by non-SAI technicians.
Damage from misuse, chemicals, heat, or water leakage is not covered.
Natural stone and quartz are not heat resistant — heat damage excluded.
Cancellation policy
Within 3 working days of signing: cancelled with 10% deduction for design work.
After first payment: no refund once production starts.
Materials ordered but not in production: client collects from warehouse — no refund.
Contract value may be adjusted if site measurements differ from approved design.
